chatSubtitle: Your scheduling assistant - you confirm before anything changes
emptyGreeting: Hi! Ask about your schedule, or tell me to book, move, or cancel something.
suggestHowBusy: How busy am I this week?
suggestProtectFocus: Protect 4 hours of focus this week
suggestFindDeck: Find 3 hours for a deck by Friday
voiceSubtitle: Hands-free · you confirm before anything changes
voiceEmpty: Tap the orb and just say what you need. Try:
hintProtectFocus: Protect 3 hours of focus this week
hintMoveMeeting: Move my next meeting to Friday
voiceUnsupported: Voice input isn't supported in this browser. Try Chrome or Safari - or switch to text chat.
greeting: Hi, I'm Otter. What can I do with your calendar?
sorryProblem: Sorry, I ran into a problem.
draftedConfirm: I've drafted that - say confirm to go ahead, or discard.
sayConfirmOrDiscard: Say confirm to go ahead, or discard.
proactiveDesc: A few things worth doing - nothing happens until you say so.
overflowDetail: You've got back-to-back meetings this week. I can warn your next guests if one runs over.
startBriefing: Start the day with a briefing
briefingDetail: Each morning I can text you the day ahead - your meetings and the focus time you've held.
textIntro: Text Otter to book, reschedule, or check your day over WhatsApp and SMS - confirm-first, just like in the app.
hostNeedsNumber: Your host needs to set the Otter texting number to finish setup.
textNeedsPhone: Texting Otter needs phone support enabled on this server (Twilio). Ask your admin to turn it on.
phoneHint: Include your country code. We'll text you a one-time code.
sendCodeFailed: Couldn't send a code to that number. Check it and try again.
verifyFailed: That code didn't match. Request a new one and try again.
bookingAssistIntro: Tell me when you're free and I'll find open times.
assistUnavailable: The assistant isn't available right now - pick a time from the grid.
assistFailed: Something went wrong - please pick a time from the grid.
